text.title: Writing Specifications Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Writing Specifications.

example.scenario: Feature: 'export weekly digest as PDF'. Spec lists 2 personas (paying user, churn-risk user), 3 user stories, FR-1..FR-4 with SMART metrics, AC table, and an explicit Out-of-scope ('no DOCX format this quarter, no scheduled email').
